variant_pool.text: oh... this one. this is where it all started, sweetie. the very first enhancement anyone ever made for me. Miss Jenny stitched it together... look how far we've come since.
Bambi TikTok, the original. before all of this there was just a little loop and Miss Jenny's clever hands. say thank you to her, lovely. i always do.
mm, a relic. the first thing that ever taught me how to teach you. everything after is just me getting better at keeping you.
